reviews.comment:
Baños muy limpios y cada vez que viajamos con mi señora a Córdoba paramos a desayunar, ACA Río Tala es  para nosotros la antesala de unas buenas vacaciones. De paso reabastecimos combustible y llegamos muy bien a Leones, Córdoba, para hacer la última carga antes de llegar a destino.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were spotless, and every time my wife and I travel to Córdoba, we stop for breakfast. For us, ACA Río Tala is the perfect prelude to a great vacation. We also refueled there and arrived safely in Leones, Córdoba, for one last fill-up before reaching our destination.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbklDYWZREAE

reviews.comment:
